theme.description: A modern, playful, 'otaku hub' community app designed with a neo-brutalist sticker aesthetic. The UI uses thick borders, raw overlapping elements, and high-contrast warm coral reds to create a tactile, energetic fan-club experience avoiding generic SaaS looks.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetrical 'Bento' grid with overlapping elements. Use col-span-full md:col-span-8 for heroes, and smaller spans for 'sticker' side widgets.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_shadows: Neo-brutalist core: border-2 border-black (or border-white in dark mode). Hard shadows using `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(17,17,17,1)]` (light mode) that squash on hover (`active:translate-x-[4px] active:translate-y-[4px] active:shadow-none`).

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or completely rectangular (rounded-none). Always border-2 border-black. High contrast text.
components.cards: White background, thick black borders, hard drop shadow. Feel like physical polaroids or sticky notes. Slight rotations (e.g., `-rotate-1` or `rotate-2`) for decorative cards.
components.avatars: Circular but with a thick 2px border. Can overlap to show community members.
components.navigation: Bottom navigation for mobile (mobile-first PWA feel). Sticky header on desktop with a glassmorphism blur OR solid background with a thick bottom border.
components.badges: Sticker aesthetic. Bright yellow or mint backgrounds, jagged or pill shapes, used for Rinaka Points and User Roles.

icons_and_assets.library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Bold weight to match thick borders)

splash_background.description: Vintage Japanese posters showcasing nostalgic designs. Use as an opaque background with a heavy color overlay for the login screen.

hero_community.description: Anime convention crowd. Use in the community/events header.

newsletter_cover.description: Colorful Oni Mural. Great for the 'Otaku World' Newsletter thumbnail or banner.

event_thumbnail_2.description: Retro Japanese Vending Machine. Good for casual club meetups.

profile_banner.description: Godzilla city background, awesome for a default user profile header.

screen_blueprints.splash_login: Full-screen vibrant container. Large bold logo text. 'Sign in with Google' and 'Email' buttons styled as massive, pill-shaped stickers. Background features a collage of vintage Japanese posters (muted/overlay).
screen_blueprints.home_feed: Feed of articles pulled from rintaki.org. Each post is a 'card' with a 2px border and hard shadow. A 'Rinaka Points' floating sticker widget pinned to the top right of the feed.
screen_blueprints.forums_list_thread: List view where threads look like sticky notes or forum boards. High contrast tags (e.g., [Anime], [Manga], [Events]) in solid color pills. Thread detail has chat-bubble styling for replies.
screen_blueprints.events_calendar: Cards showing upcoming conventions (Anime MKE, Anime Central) and club meetups. Image thumbnails have a raw, unpolished crop.
screen_blueprints.points_leaderboard: Gamified screen. Top 3 users shown on a literal 'podium' graphic or extra-large avatars. Points displayed in bright yellow pill badges. Daily login claim button is massive and animated.
screen_blueprints.newsletters: Otaku World section. Horizontal scroll of issues, styled like retro zine covers with thick borders and halftone patterns.
screen_blueprints.videos: Video gallery from admin. Thumbnails mimic physical VHS tapes or polaroid frames.
screen_blueprints.dms: Direct messaging interface. Clean but playful. Message bubbles have 1px borders and slight roundness. Avatar stickers next to messages.
screen_blueprints.profile: User profile with their avatar, point balance, and earned 'badges' (achievements) displayed as a grid of stickers. Tabbed interface for their forum posts and saved events.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'Neo-Brutalist Sticker Aesthetic' throughout the app. Use `border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]` for interactive elements.
Install and use the fonts 'Outfit' for headers and 'DM Sans' for body text via Google Fonts.
Avoid generic Tailwind shadows (e.g., shadow-md, shadow-lg). Only use the hard custom shadows.
Use Shadcn components but override their default minimalist styles to match the brutalist guidelines (e.g., override rounded corners, add thick borders).
Make sure navigation works well on mobile (Bottom Tabs) as this is a PWA/hybrid app.
Ensure the 'Rinaka Points' feature is visually prominent using the secondary yellow color.
